_meta.note: Daemon-backed workspace snapshot apply (omni P1). Restores a persisted snapshot's cwd + bounded env into a live session by running `export K=V` then `cd <cwd>` through the session shell (the terminal-state + secret guards apply). Returns the restored cwd. TB-7: snapshot_id and session_id are opaque (copy verbatim).

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: persistent shell sessions are not available on this platform yet (PTY/ConPTY pending)

session_not_live_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [SessionNotLive]: session ses_018f0000000000000000000000000007 is not live (state observed terminal)

invariants: an unknown snapshot fails with FileNotFound; a non-live target session fails with SessionNotLive (terminal-state guard)
restoration runs through the session shell so cwd/env become sticky for subsequent shell_session_exec lines
success payload reports applied + the restored cwd; never a raw stream
